zh.Seal, Kent, England: 英國肯特澤亞爾 哈特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Theobald IV於1444年出生在英國肯特澤亞爾時，他的父親Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal32歲，母親Christine Kroesmer29歲。他於1471年與Lady Joan Nisell在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年9月9日在英國享年57歲。

zh-hans.Seal, Kent, England: 英国肯特澤亞爾 哈特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Theobald IV于1444年出生在英国肯特澤亞爾时，他的父亲Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal32岁，母亲Christine Kroesmer29岁。他于1471年与Lady Joan Nisell在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1501年9月9日在英国享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and English: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements theud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The English surname represents a learned form, re-created from French Théobald. The usual medieval forms of the name in English and German were Tebald and Tibalt (Old French Teobaud, Tibaut). Compare Dewald and Diebold .

variants.name: Dewald
meanings: German: from the personal name Diebold, from Middle High German Dietbold, from Old High German diot ‘people, nation’ + bald ‘brave, strong’. As an American surname this is also an altered form of the cognate Theobald . Compare Davolt , Dawalt , Daywalt , Devault 3, and Dewalt 1.

History: One of the first Dewalds in North America was Johannes Michael Dewald from Medard, a village in the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived at Philadelphia, PA, in 1738 on the ship Glasgow. He married Maria Barbara Schmidt and settled in Berks County, PA. His father's surname was Theobald. Michael's descendants also bear some other altered forms of the surname, including Dewalt, Dawalt, and Davolt. — One of the earliest immigrants who bore the original German surname Dewald was Henry alias He(i)nrich Dewald from the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived in PA in 1766. His descendants mainly bear altered forms of the surname, especially Devault .

variants.name: Tidball
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): variant of   Theobald  .

variants.name: Tebbs
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of Tebb, which is usually from a pet form of the Middle English male personal name Tebbold (see Theobald ).

variants.name: Tipple
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the medieval personal name Tebald, Tibalt (see Theobald ).
German: nickname for a simple person, from Low German tippel ‘point, corner’ (a reference to the pointed shape of a fool's cap).
German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name, a pet form of   Dietrich  .

variants.name: Tibbs
meanings: English: variant of Tibb, from the Middle English personal name Tibbe, which was used in the 13th century as both male (from Tibald, see Theobald ) and female name (a shortened form of Tibot, a pet form of Isabel, see Tebbutt ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Theobald IV was born in 1444, in Seal, Kent, England, his father, Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal, was 32 and his mother, Christine Kroesmer, was 29. He married Lady Joan Nisell in 1471, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1501, in England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Theobald IV est né en 1444, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Christine Kroesmer, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Nisell en 1471, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1501, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Theobald IV 1444 in Seal, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal 32 und seine Mutter Christine Kroesmer 29. Er hat 1471 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Lady Joan Nisell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1501 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Theobald IV è nato il nel 1444 nel Seal, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Christine Kroesmer, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Nisell nel 1471, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1501, nel England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Shepley Hall, Seal, Kent, England, Unite: イギリスケントセアル
ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Theobald IVが1444年にイギリスケントセアルで生まれた時，父Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Sealは32歳，母Christine Kroesmerは29歳であった。1471年にイギリスイギリスケントでLady Joan Nisellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年9月9日にイギリスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Theobald IV(이)가 1444년 영국 켄트 시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine Kroesmer(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Lady Joan Nisell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 9월 9일 영국에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Theobald IV nasceu em 1444, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Christine Kroesmer, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Nisell em 1471, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1501, em Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Theobald IV родился в 1444 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Christine Kroesmer, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Nisell в 1471 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1501 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Theobald IV nació en 1444, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Nicholas Theobald III, Baron Theobald of Seal, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Christine Kroesmer, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Joan Nisell en 1471, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1501, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
